result_excerpt: ## Fairness Slice Audit Report: Stroke Prediction Model ### Executive Summary I conducted a fairness audit on a stroke prediction model, analyzing **False Negative Rate (FNR)** and **Recall** across gender and residence type demographic slices. The model was trained on 5,110 patient records with severe class imbalance (only 4.9% stroke cases). --- ### Key Findings #### Overall Model Performance - **Recall**: 70.0% (with optimized threshold of 0.3) - **Precision**: 13.9% - **F1 Score**: 23.2% ###
